note: MEASURED baseline (Phase-12 Wave A/B/C, sonnet single-shot, 103 curated paired cases). Category fixes: open-redirect own category; SSRF allow-list recognizer; LLM05 (model-output->sink=improper-output-handling); hardcoded-secret->crypto; py-mcp-tokenpassthrough relabeled tool-poisoning->data-exfil (the label was wrong per ai-llm SS4).
